# StudySphere AI

> AI-powered learning workspace for Grade 12 learners.

## Pages
- [Dashboard](/): Study success hub with stats and quick access
- [Study Materials](/materials): Generate notes, flashcards, and practice questions
- [Notes Summarizer](/summarizer): Turn class notes into revision packs
- [Study Planner](/planner): AI-built schedules and task tracker
- [Research Assistant](/research): Topic explanations and exam-focused summaries
- [AI Tutor Chat](/tutor): Conversational academic mentor
- [Progress Tracker](/progress): Study streaks and weekly stats
- [Settings](/settings): Privacy and local data controls
